personal_info.headline: Full Stack Developer, Creative Technologist, and Digital Product Builder
personal_info.summary: Full stack developer, engineer, artist, and inventor based in Tunisia with experience building digital products, automation systems, educational platforms, booking systems, branding assets, and experimental hardware projects.

work_experience.title: Founder & Mobile Developer
responsibilities: Architecting and building a B2B mobile platform that centralizes multi-business management from a single interface
Leading product strategy, design, and end-to-end development lifecycle
Managing backend infrastructure with Firebase and building cross-platform UI with Flutter
Conducting market research and iterating on product based on early user feedback
achievements: Launched MVP of a multi-business management platform as a solo founder
Delivered a cross-platform mobile experience using Flutter targeting B2B clients in Tunisia

work_experience.title: Full Stack Developer & Graphic Designer
responsibilities: Developing and maintaining frontend systems and web applications
Designing UI components, marketing materials, and brand assets
Collaborating with product teams to translate requirements into polished interfaces
Producing motion graphics and video content for digital campaigns
achievements: Contributed to multiple client-facing products across both design and development tracks
Established consistent design language across frontend systems

work_experience.title: Frontend Developer
responsibilities: Built a fully functional React website for an IoT company from scratch
Integrated custom Lottie file animations and interactive 3D elements for an immersive experience
Implemented a complete blog system with an admin dashboard and a custom mini CMS without relying on third-party CMS platforms
Applied full SEO optimization including meta tags, structured data, and performance tuning
achievements: Shipped a production-ready React website within 2 months
Delivered a custom CMS solution that gave the client full content control without external dependencies
Achieved strong SEO scores through technical and on-page optimization

work_experience.title: Graphic Designer
responsibilities: Handled all graphic design needs including flyers, business cards, and banners
Created print-ready and digital assets aligned with the brand's visual identity
Coordinated with the client to ensure design output matched their communication goals
achievements: Delivered a full suite of marketing collateral covering all of MallouliAuto's design needs within one month

work_experience.title: Brand Designer & UI/UX Designer
responsibilities: Designed the company logo and established the full graphic identity and brand guidelines
Created a cohesive visual language including typography, color palette, and iconography
Led UI/UX design for the company's mobile app, covering user flows, wireframes, and high-fidelity prototypes
achievements: Shipped brand identity and logo within 2 weeks of project kickoff
Produced a complete UI/UX design system for the mobile app ready for handoff to development

work_experience.title: Graphic Designer
responsibilities: Produced visual content and design assets across various digital and print formats
Supported the creative team with branding, social media graphics, and marketing materials
Maintained visual consistency across all client-facing outputs
achievements: Delivered consistent design output across multiple ongoing client projects
Contributed to brand refresh initiatives that improved visual coherence

work_experience.title: Video Editor & Content Creator
responsibilities: Handled end-to-end video production including videography, scripting, and post-production editing
Wrote compelling scripts tailored to target audiences for social media and marketing campaigns
Edited footage with motion graphics, sound design, and color grading for polished final deliverables
achievements: Produced a consistent pipeline of video content supporting the company's content marketing strategy
Improved production turnaround time by streamlining the scripting-to-edit workflow

work_experience.title: Social Media Manager
responsibilities: Managed social media presence across multiple platforms including content planning and scheduling
Created and curated content aligned with brand voice and audience engagement goals
Tracked performance metrics and adjusted strategy based on analytics insights
achievements: Grew audience engagement through consistent content strategy over a 5-month period
Built and maintained a content calendar that ensured regular, on-brand posting

projects.name: Personal Website
projects.description: A responsive website showcasing my skills and experience

projects.name: Automation System
projects.description: An automation system for streamlining business processes

projects.name: Cleaning Products Business Management Software
projects.description: Python/Tkinter software for companies manufacturing cleaning products. Includes management tools and a lab section capable of scraping chemical data, prices, and supplier information.
projects.outcome: Designed as a commercial one-time purchase product with modular paid feature expansion.

projects.name: Artist-Focused Mobile Application
projects.description: Application designed for artists with integrated monetization using non-intrusive ads and creative-focused features.
projects.outcome: Created as a scalable platform targeting creative users.

projects.name: Randev Booking System
projects.description: Booking system for businesses such as hair salons and car washes with branded marketing materials and animated promotional content.
projects.outcome: Produced promotional campaign assets including Eid-themed animated advertising.

projects.name: Container Housing Business Concept
projects.description: Business model focused on recycling shipping containers into affordable housing while reducing CO2 emissions, water consumption, construction resources, and build times.
projects.outcome: Developed detailed business plan concepts and sustainability positioning.

projects.name: Low-Cost 3D Printer Conversion
projects.description: Engineering project converting a 3D pen into a low-cost smartphone-controlled 3D printer using Arduino-compatible hardware and an ESP32-CAM.
projects.outcome: Created a modular non-destructive design allowing both manual and automated use.

projects.name: Discord Moderation Automation
projects.description: AutoHotkey automation script for Discord moderation workflows.
projects.outcome: Automated repetitive moderation responses and shortcuts.

projects.name: English 101 Learning Platform
projects.description: Educational platform for English learning with quizzes and interactive learning content.
projects.outcome: Built as a digital learning experience for students.

projects.name: Coffee Shop Mobile App
projects.description: Custom-themed coffee shop application inspired by the branding and mascots of the business, including a built-in mini-game.
projects.outcome: Created a branded customer engagement experience.

projects.name: Robotics and Programming Education Content
projects.description: Digital content and branding work for local robotics and programming education centers in Tunisia.
projects.outcome: Produced marketing and educational promotional materials.

projects.name: CV Maker
projects.description: Local AI-powered job application automation platform. Discovers LinkedIn job listings, generates hyper-tailored CVs and cover letters via a GAN-style LLM loop, auto-applies via Playwright or SMTP, and provides a persona-driven interview simulator.

projects.name: EduLink
projects.description: Professional network platform built around how teachers teach, enabling educators to connect and collaborate based on their pedagogical approaches.

projects.name: Princess – Love Quote Reels
projects.description: TikTok-style infinite-scroll web app that generates and displays personalized love quote reels.

projects.name: Resty – Eye Rest App
projects.description: Flutter mobile application that guides users through the 20-20-20 eye rest method to reduce screen-induced eye strain.

projects.name: Media Resolution Viewer
projects.description: Web app for displaying media content with a selectable quality resolution picker ranging from 144p to 1080p.

projects.name: Malloulinova – B2B IoT Consulting Platform
projects.description: Full-stack B2B IoT consulting platform featuring article management, multi-tag project filtering, a Groq-powered AI chatbot for lead qualification, real-time visitor analytics with click heatmaps, and an admin dashboard.

projects.name: Public Police – Civic Infraction Reporting App
projects.description: Web application enabling citizens to report minor infractions with supporting evidence, and administrators to view, filter, approve, or reject submitted reports via a dashboard. Includes light/dark theme and localStorage persistence.

projects.name: Don't Shift – Focus Timer & Task Manager
projects.description: Desktop focus timer and task management application designed to help users maintain deep work and reduce context switching.

projects.name: Hackathon Project
projects.description: Full-stack hackathon submission with a Java/TypeScript backend and HTML/CSS frontend, built competitively as part of a programming event.

projects.name: LibRent – Library Rental System
projects.description: Web-based library book rental management system.

projects.name: Iyed Colab Rental System
projects.description: PHP-based rental management web application built for the Iyed Colab workspace.

projects.name: Shiftewi – Student Tools & Games
projects.description: Website offering a collection of useful tools and browser games targeted towards students.

projects.name: Chessewi – Browser Chess Game
projects.description: Proof-of-concept browser chess game with a 5×6 grid, Unicode piece rendering, and click-to-move interaction.

projects.name: Rush It – Pomodoro Web App
projects.description: Web-based Pomodoro timer for time management and focused work sessions.

projects.name: Sabboura – Web Whiteboard
projects.description: Browser-based digital whiteboard application for freehand drawing and note-taking.

projects.name: Chkobba Score Counter
projects.description: Simple web-based score tracker for the traditional Tunisian card game Chkobba.

projects.name: Iyed Coffee Menu
projects.description: Digital coffee menu web application for the Iyed Colab space.

projects.name: PokDex – Pokédex Web App
projects.description: Simple browser-based Pokédex for browsing and looking up Pokémon data.

personality_and_work_style.team_preference: Collaborative team player who values open communication and feedback

long_term_goals: Create innovative products that make a positive impact
preferences_and_goals.career_goal: To start my own tech company and create innovative products that make a positive impact

avoid: Jargon and technical terms that may be unfamiliar to non-technical readers
